metadata.name: Audit Adherence to Travel & Expense Policy

description: An auditor checks if employee expense reports are in compliance with the company's T&E policy.

nodes.task_description: Select a sample of 50 expense reports that included airfare.

expected_outcome.expected: A sample is selected for testing.

nodes.task_description: For each sampled report, verify that employees booked economy class tickets, as required by policy for domestic travel.

expected_outcome.expected: Auditor finds 4 instances of business class travel that were not pre-approved.

nodes.task_description: Verify that all meal expenses claimed are within the per diem limit set by the policy.

expected_outcome.expected: Auditor confirms all sampled meal expenses are compliant.
